crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Identifies the 64 bit API hashing function used by Metasploit. This has been re-used by many other malware families.
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Elastic Security

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects suspicious single byte XORed keyword 'Mozilla/5.0' - it uses yara's XOR modifier and therefore cannot print the XOR key. You can use the CyberChef recipe linked in the reference field to brute force the used key.
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: detect CobaltStrike Beacon in memory

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects a unspecified hack tool, crack or malware using a reflective loader - no hard match - further investigation recommended

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Identifies the API address lookup function used by metasploit. Also used by other tools (like beacon).

attributes.html:
YARA Signature Match - THOR APT Scanner

RULE: HKTL_CobaltStrike_PS1_Loader_Indicators_May21_1
RULE_SET: Livehunt - Hacktools75 Indicators 🛠
RULE_TYPE: VALHALLA rule feed only ⚡
RULE_LINK: https://valhalla.nextron-systems.com/info/rule/HKTL_CobaltStrike_PS1_Loader_Indicators_May21_1
DESCRIPTION: Detects strings found as artefacts in CobaltStrike based intrusions
REFERENCE: https://www.sans.org/webcasts/tech-tuesday-workshop-cobalt-strike-detection-log-analysis-119395
RULE_AUTHOR: Florian Roth

This seems to be a component of Cobalt Strike, an adversary simulation framework sold by HelpSystems. If you've become a victim of an attack in which this software has been used, you may get help by sending an email with a request for help to cobalt.custops@helpsystems.com

Detection Timestamp: 2023-10-04 02:33
AV Detection Ratio: 🟢 64 / 72

Use these tags to search for similar matches: #cobaltstrike #ps1 #loader #indicators #hktl_cobaltstrike_ps1_loader_indicators_may21_1 #cobaltstrike
More information: https://www.nextron-systems.com/notes-on-virustotal-matches/
